zh.lifeSummary: 當William Baliol of Hoprig, 2nd of Lamington於1320年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾拉明頓時，他的父親Sir Wlliam Baliol of Cavers, 1st of Lamington30歲，母親Elizabeth Wallace Heiress of Lamington25歲。他與Isabella Marion Seton在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1358年住在蘇格蘭藍納可爾。他於1346年登記服兵役。他去世於1389年在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾拉明頓享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Baliol of Hoprig, 2nd of Lamington于1320年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾拉明頓时，他的父亲Sir Wlliam Baliol of Cavers, 1st of Lamington30岁，母亲Elizabeth Wallace Heiress of Lamington25岁。他与Isabella Marion Seton在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1358年住在苏格兰藍納可爾。他于1346年登记服兵役。他去世于1389年在英国苏格兰藍納可爾拉明頓享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Baliol of Hoprig, 2nd of Lamington was born in 1320, in Lamington, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Wlliam Baliol of Cavers, 1st of Lamington, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Wallace Heiress of Lamington, was 25. He married Isabella Marion Seton in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He lived in Lanarkshire, Scotland in 1358. He registered for military service in 1346. He died in 1389, in Lamington, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Baliol of Hoprig, 2nd of Lamington est né en 1320, à Lamington, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Wlliam Baliol of Cavers, 1st of Lamington, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wallace Heiress of Lamington, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Marion Seton à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Lanarkshire, Écosse en 1358. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1346. Il est décédé en 1389, à Lamington, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Baliol of Hoprig, 2nd of Lamington 1320 in Lamington, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Wlliam Baliol of Cavers, 1st of Lamington 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Wallace Heiress of Lamington 25. Er hat in Schottland, United Kingdom Isabella Marion Seton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1358 hat er in Lanarkshire, Scotland gelebt. Er hat sich 1346 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1389 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Lamington, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Baliol of Hoprig, 2nd of Lamington è nato il nel 1320 nel Lamington, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Wlliam Baliol of Cavers, 1st of Lamington, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Wallace Heiress of Lamington, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Marion Seton nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Lanarkshire, Scotland nel 1358. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1346. Morì nel 1389, nel Lamington, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Baliol of Hoprig, 2nd of Lamingtonが1320年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアラミントンで生まれた時，父Sir Wlliam Baliol of Cavers, 1st of Lamingtonは30歳，母Elizabeth Wallace Heiress of Lamingtonは25歳であった。イギリススコットランドでIsabella Marion Setonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1358年にはスコットランドラナルクシュアイアに住んでいた。彼は1346年に兵役登録をした。彼は1389年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアラミントンで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Baliol of Hoprig, 2nd of Lamington(이)가 1320년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 램잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Wlliam Baliol of Cavers, 1st of Lamington(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Wallace Heiress of Lamington(은)는 25세였다. 그는 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Isabella Marion Seton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1358년도에 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 살았다. 그는 1346년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1389년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 램잉턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Baliol of Hoprig, 2nd of Lamington nasceu em 1320, em Lamington, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Wlliam Baliol of Cavers, 1st of Lamington, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Wallace Heiress of Lamington, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Marion Seton em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Lanarkshire, Scotland em 1358. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1346. Ele faleceu em 1389, em Lamington, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Baliol of Hoprig, 2nd of Lamington родился в 1320 г. в местности лэмингтон, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Wlliam Baliol of Cavers, 1st of Lamington было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wallace Heiress of Lamington, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Marion Seton в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия в 1358 году. В 1346 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1389 г. в местности лэмингтон, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Baliol of Hoprig, 2nd of Lamington nació en 1320, en Lamington, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Wlliam Baliol of Cavers, 1st of Lamington, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Wallace Heiress of Lamington, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Isabella Marion Seton en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Vivió en Lanarkshire, Scotland en 1358. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1346. Murió en 1389, en Lamington, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
